mission.title: antrea: Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support
mission.description: Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current antrea deployment
steps.description:
Verify your antrea version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
helm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working antrea installation.

steps.title: Review antrea configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea
```
[Google Docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/196XsLQHEJM1BVRovpaSrnZxxg3beZ8x8fsJ9CFmqzws/edit?usp=sharing)
**Describe what you are trying to solve**
_This draft is only for Linux Nodes, we still need to design the solution for Windows

steps.title: Apply the fix for Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support
steps.description:
Note: To verify this PR, the NodePort support is enabled. The feature gate should be disabled before merging this PR.
```yaml
### Appendix

#### TC handle ID generation(NodePort Traffic From Remote / Request Traffic)

The handle ID `0x6dea9` and `0x106dea9` is calculated from:

- IP address index. As an interface may have multiple IP addresses. When getting IP addresses from an interface in a slice, the IP address index is the slice index.
- L3 protocol.  IPv4(0x0), IPv6(0x29)
- L4 protocol.  TCP(0x6), UDP(0x11), SCTP(0x84)
- port number. NodePort port number.

The handle ID is :
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Antrea Proxy NodePort Service Support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Note: To verify this PR, the NodePort support is enabled. The feature gate should be disabled before merging this PR.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with antrea installed or the issue environment reproducible.
